author: xinlingfeiwu
title: Work Queue Priority Uses Lenient Score Headroom Instead of Strict Score Target
notes: Verified bug: enrich_with_impact() at ranking.py:80 calls compute_health_breakdown(dimension_scores) without score_key='strict', causing work queue prioritization to use lenient headroom while the UI target is strict_score. All line references (ranking.py:80, health.py:53, state_integration.py:142,202-204, next/cmd.py:298) are exactly correct. The fix (pass score_key='strict') is simple and correct. This is a real semantic mismatch between the optimization objective and the displayed target.
